subcodes.first_line: This is a day of joy and exultation - joy from what? From the crimson wine of divine love in this radiant morn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روز روز نشاط و انبساط است نشاط از چه از صهبای محبت الهی در این صبح نورانی نشهد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
